2604.13787.title: ToolOmni: Enabling Open-World Tool Use via Agentic learning with Proactive Retrieval and Grounded Execution
2604.13787.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) enhance their problem-solving capability by utilizing external tools. However, in open-world scenarios with massive and evolving tool repositories, existing methods relying on static embedding retrieval or parameter memorization of tools struggle to align user intent with tool semantics or generalize to unseen tools, respectively, leading to suboptimal accuracy of open-world tool retrieval and execution. To address these, we present ToolOmni, a unified agentic framework that enables LLMs for open-world tool use by proactive retrieval and grounded execution within a reasoning loop. First, we construct a cold-start multi-turn interaction dataset to instill foundational agentic capabilities via Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). Then, we introduce open-world tool learning based on a Decoupled Multi-Objective GRPO algorithm, which simultaneously optimizes LLMs for both tool retrieval accuracy and execution efficacy in online environments. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ToolOmni achieves state-of-the-art performance both in retrieval and execution, surpassing strong baselines by a significant margin of +10.8% in end-to-end execution success rate, while exhibiting exceptional robustness and generalization capabilities.
2604.13787.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）透過利用外部工具來增強其解決問題的能力。<lb/>然而，在擁有龐大且不斷演變的工具庫的開放世界場景中，現有方法依賴靜態嵌入檢索或工具的參數記憶，難以將用戶意圖與工具語義對齊，或無法對未見過的工具進行泛化，從而導致開放世界工具檢索和執行的準確性不理想。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，我們提出了ToolOmni，一個統一的代理框架，通過主動檢索和在推理循環中進行基於實證的執行，使LLMs能夠在開放世界中使用工具。<lb/>首先，我們構建了一個冷啟動的多輪互動數據集，通過監督微調（SFT）來灌輸基礎的代理能力。<lb/>然後，我們引入基於解耦多目標GRPO算法的開放世界工具學習，該算法同時優化LLMs在在線環境中的工具檢索準確性和執行效能。<lb/>大量實驗表明，ToolOmni在檢索和執行方面均達到了最先進的性能，超越了強基準，端到端執行成功率提高了10.8%，同時展現出卓越的穩健性和泛化能力。
2604.13787.author: Shouzheng Huang et.al.
2604.13787.authors: Shouzheng Huang, Meishan Zhang, Baotian Hu, Min Zhang
